Manage your content and track approval status Subscription Active Yearly plan is active on this teacher account. ✏️ 4 My Quizzes 📖 2 My Lessons 📄 1 My Papers ⏳ 0 Pending awaiting review 📋 How Content Approval Works 1 📝 Create Create your quiz, lesson, or paper. It starts as a Draft. 2 📤 Submit Submit it for approval when it's ready to publish. 3 🔍 Review An admin reviews and either approves or gives feedback. 4 ✅ Live! Once approved, learners can see and use your content. Quick Actions ✏️ Create Quiz Build a new multiple-choice quiz 📄 Import Quiz Convert Word/PDF into editable questions ✦ AI Quiz Generator Draft questions with Zed 📖 Create Lesson Write lesson notes for learners 📤 Upload Paper Upload a past exam paper (PDF) 📁 My Content View, edit, and submit for approval Zed ×
